description_long: This jet ski features a streamlined, angular body with a predominantly red and black color scheme accented by yellow and green elements. The front is sharply pointed, with black panels flanking a central ridge, and yellow highlights near the top. The rear includes two green cylindrical exhausts and a circular gold emblem, while the sides display exposed mechanical components and yellow footrests. The handlebars are elevated and angled, with red grips and a green central mount. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and chipped paint, suggesting frequent use. The overall design is compact and sporty, suitable for high-speed water navigation.
description: A compact, angular jet ski with a red, black, yellow, and green color scheme, featuring visible wear and sporty design elements.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the pointed nose, black panels, and yellow accents near the top, with the handlebars visible above.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the red body, yellow footrests, exposed mechanical parts, and green cylindrical components at the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view shows two green exhausts, a circular gold emblem, and the angular tail structure with visible wear.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the red body, yellow footrests, and green rear components, with more mechanical details visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular gold emblem is visible at the rear center of the jet ski, but no specific brand is identifiable.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is elevated and angular, with red grips and a green central mount, appearing sturdy and functional.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat is a single, elongated unit with a contoured shape, designed for one or possibly two riders, and is primarily green with visible wear.
